ddls:
CREATE TABLE "building_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of building material (e.g., Aluminum, Steel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building material */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number or name of the building material */,
  "application" TEXT /* Application or use case of the building material */,
  "material_category" TEXT /* Category of the building material (e.g., roofing, walls, doors) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the building material */,
  "packing_type" TEXT /* Type of packing used for the material (e.g., box, roll, pallet) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the building material */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the building material (length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material the document belongs to */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., Shop Drawing, CAD, Data Sheet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bim_links" (
  "bim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BIM link */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material the BIM link belongs to */,
  "bim_link" TEXT /* URL or file path to the BIM link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BIM link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bim_links_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material the specification belongs to */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., 3-Part Spec) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the specification */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the specification in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the specification was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leed_certifications" (
  "leed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LEED certification */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material the LEED certification belongs to */,
  "leed_category" TEXT /* Category of the LEED certification (e.g., LEED Gold, LEED Platinum) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the LEED certification */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the LEED certification in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the LEED certification was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the LEED certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leed_certifications_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_guides" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation guide */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material the installation guide belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the installation guide */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the installation guide in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the installation guide was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the installation guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installation_guides_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_documents" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty document */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material the warranty document belongs to */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Period of the warranty (e.g., 5 years, 10 years) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the warranty document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the warranty document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warranty document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_documents_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, contractor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the building material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the building material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_materials" (
  "project_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-material relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the building material used in the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the material in the project (e.g., ordered, delivered, installed) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the material was ordered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the material was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES material_suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned as the project manager */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project they are managing */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date they started managing the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date they stopped managing the project */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_supplies" (
  "material_supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material supply */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date the material was supplied */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material supplied */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the material */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_supplies_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES building_materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_supplies_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_supplies_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES material_suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order is expected to be delivered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES material_suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
